$description: The focus ring. Geometry captured 1:1 from the component classes (focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50). DESIGN DECISION 2026-07-13: the ring is the BRAND color — color.ring now resolves to the primary teal (brand.config ring = brand.secondary.300), so focus reads as 'the product is talking to you', not as a grey system artifact. focus.ring.paint is the single token the Figma 'Focus ring' effect style binds its color to. Hand-owned.

paint.$description: The ring's actual paint: color.ring at 50% (ring-ring/50). Kept as a live color-mix so it follows --ring through a brand swap — a variable alias cannot carry the 50% alpha, which is why this token exists instead of pointing straight at {color.ring}.

blur.$description: Softens the ring's outer edge. Tailwind's ring-* utility cannot blur, so on 2026-07-13 every focus ring in components/ui was swapped from focus-visible:ring-3 + ring-ring/50 to focus-visible:shadow-(--focus-shadow) — one token, one look, and it now matches the Figma 'Focus ring' effect exactly.

paint.$description: The invalid ring's paint: color.destructive at 20% (aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20). Invalid is destructive — it is the shadcn 'error emphasis' role, not a status/* colour.

shadow.$description: The invalid ring — same geometry as focus.shadow (3px spread + 4px blur), destructive instead of ring. DESIGN DECISION 2026-07-13: invalid used to be a hard-edged 3px ring while focus was blurred; one system, one ring shape. NOTE: the old dark-mode bump to 40% was dropped — one value in both modes.
The Figma 'Focus ring' effect style, expressed as CSS: 3px spread + 4px blur, brand primary at 50%. Follows --ring — it is no longer the kit's frozen grey rgb(161 161 161 / 0.5).
